GoalOSTake-Care Console
Take CareCommandAutopilotAskAll pagesBoundary

One box · one mission · one route handoff

Tell GoalOS what you want.GoalOS takes care of the proof path.

Write naturally. No route names required. GoalOS locally converts your objective into a Mission Contract, Evidence Docket plan, Verifier Mesh, Governed Decision State, Action Graph, Chronicle handoff, and recommended next page.

See all pages

Browser-local demonstration. No account. No form submission. No wallet. No token approval. No analytics. No cookies. No browser storage. No network request from the console. No transaction broadcast. No production authority. No user data retained.

Recommended route will appear here.

Recommended route

Awaiting objective

GoalOS will choose the safest first page after it reads the objective.

Open recommended route →confidence 0%mode waiting

GoalOS progress

Proof plan

Governed Decision State

WAITING

{}

For non-technical visitors

Plain language is enough.

You do not need to know whether your next page is an Evidence Docket, Mission Control, RSI console, or legal boundary. Type the outcome; GoalOS prepares the path.

For advanced users

Receipts stay inspectable.

The console emits a local GoalOSTakeCareReceipt with route, proof plan, verifier mesh, boundary, and decision state. The JSON can be reviewed or copied into another workflow.

For the institution

Boundaries stay visible.

It does not collect data, call a model, submit a form, connect wallets, move funds, certify facts, complete audits, or grant production authority.

GoalOS Care Command

Start with one objective.

Tell GoalOS what you want. It prepares the proof path, answers questions locally, and routes you to the right page while every preserved page remains available.

Open Care Command →All pagesAsk GoalOS
